steps.title: Rewrite as squares
steps.content:
The expression is a difference of squares because 
$$
5=(\sqrt{5})^2
$$
$$
x^2-5=x^2-(\sqrt{5})^2
$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the original expression and the choices; the equivalent expression has the same graph for every $x$. The answer is C.
